name: tuition-workspace
description: Root dev orchestrator: runs backend + frontend together. NOT a pnpm workspace — each service stays standalone with its own deps/lockfile. concurrently is the only root dependency.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C backend dev" "pnpm -C frontend dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C backend build" "pnpm -C frontend build"
scripts.lint: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C backend lint" "pnpm -C frontend lint"
scripts.test: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C backend test" "pnpm -C frontend test"
scripts.install:all: pnpm -C backend install && pnpm -C frontend install
